recommendations.excerpt: Wyoming’s Golden Triangle is an ecological wonder, but the management plan protecting it from oil and gas development faces unprecedented attacks.

recommendations.title: FCC chair threatens to revoke broadcasters' licences over Iran coverage
recommendations.excerpt: After Trump criticised media coverage of the Iran war, Carr says he can remove licences if they do not serve the public interest.

recommendations.title: A successful USDA program that has supported more than 533,000 affordable rental homes in rural America is being phased out
recommendations.excerpt: Hundreds of thousands of rural families could lose their affordable homes as mortgages the program supported expire by 2050.

recommendations.title: Iran War Risks Sharpening Fed Divisions Over Rate Cuts
recommendations.excerpt: The Federal Reserve is set to hold interest rates steady this week as officials grapple with a host of new economic risks stemming from the conflict in the Middle East.

recommendations.title: Cuba will allow nationals living abroad to invest in and own businesses on the island, economic czar tells NBC News
recommendations.excerpt: “Cuba is open to having a fluid commercial relationship with U.S. companies” and “also with Cubans residing in the United States and their descendants,” Deputy Prime Minister Oscar Pérez-Oliva Fraga said in an interview in Havana.

recommendations.title: The War Is Making It Harder to Keep the Lights On, 2,000 Miles Away
recommendations.excerpt: Bangladesh is taking steps to conserve electricity, which its factories need to keep stitching together the world’s clothing.

recommendations.title: Holiday spending, export demand drive China’s economic momentum as Iran war headwinds loom
recommendations.excerpt: Beijing tamped down its GDP growth target this year to a range of 4.5% to 5%, the least ambitious goal on record going back to the early 1990s.

recommendations.title: Beyond the strait: why attacks on Kharg Island could keep oil prices high
recommendations.excerpt: Oil could pass 2008 record of $147.50 a barrel as damage and field closures risk compounding supply shock caused by Iran war

recommendations.title: Bank stocks have been crushed this year. 2 of our names should weather the storm
recommendations.excerpt: The businesses of Goldman Sachs and Wells Fargo should be largely insulated from the three major headwinds facing the industry.

recommendations.title: CEOs of top airlines demand Congress restore funding to Homeland Security and pay airport workers
recommendations.excerpt: The CEOs of the nation’s top airline companies are imploring Congress to restore funding to the Department of Homeland Security and embrace a bipartisan solution to pay federal aviation workers, including airport security officers, during a partial govern

recommendations.title: 3,800 workers are on strike at one of the largest meatpacking plants in the US
recommendations.excerpt: About 3,800 workers are striking at one of the nation’s largest meatpacking plants. Union representatives in Colorado say it's the first strike at a U.S. beef slaughterhouse since the 1980s.

recommendations.title: Taxpayer bill for saving Scunthorpe steel furnaces could top £1.5bn by 2028, auditor says
recommendations.excerpt: National Audit Office highlights benefits of state rescue for jobs and orders but warns of continuing high cost

recommendations.title: U.S. oil soars past $100 a barrel as Iran war shows no signs of ending soon
recommendations.excerpt: The Strait of Hormuz, responsible for 20% of the world’s oil supply, remains essentially closed.

recommendations.title: The Ethical Dilemma of Being Friends With a Cheater
recommendations.excerpt: If they can betray their partner, what does it say about how they’ll treat you?
